MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-18-2022 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AGAINST DEFENDANTS KORAY ERGUR AND BYFT LLC IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MOVING PARTY FAILS TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT THE REQUESTED RELIEF MAY BE GRANTED AS A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION FOR THE COURT TO ORDER THE DEFENDANT TO VACATE THE PROPERTY WITHOUT APPROPRIATE LEGAL PROCEDURES FOR REMOVAL OF OCCUPANTS. FURTHERMORE, PROPOSED RELIEF IS SO NON-SPECIFIC THAT IT IS NOT ENFORCEABLE EVEN IF GRANTED: "CEASE ALL ACTIVITIES THAT WOULD CONTRIBUTE TO THE PROPERTY'S DECLINE OR DECAY." PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Notice Of Plaintiff'S Motion For A Preliminary Injunction Against Defendants Koray Ergur And Byft Llc
Off Calendar Feb-18-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

NOTICE OF PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AGAINST DEFENDANTS KORAY ERGUR AND BYFT LLC is DENIED without prejudice. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that the requested relief may be granted as a preliminary injunction for the Court to order the defendant to vacate the property without appropriate legal procedures for removal of occupants. Furthermore, proposed relief is so non-specific that it is not enforceable even if granted: "cease all activities that would contribute to the property's decline or decay."

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Cross-Complaint (20220217)

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT KOREY ERGUR'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST CROSS-COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion For A Preliminary Injunction Against Defendants Koray Ergur And Byft Llc
Off Calendar Feb-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Defendant KORAY ERGUR present;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WEI-SHING SU's Motion For A Preliminary Injunction Against Defendants Koray Ergur and Byft LLC.

Dept. 302 informs Mr. Ergur that it will transfer any paper courtesy copies it may happen to still have that relate to this motion to Dept. 501.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all quiet title matters per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Notice Of Plaintiff'S Motion For A Preliminary Injunction Against Defendants Koray Ergur And Byft Llc
Off Calendar Feb-07-2022 Continued To Feb-18-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
No appearance by Plaintiff.
Korey Ergur, 415-938-6813, Defendant in Pro Per does not contest the tentative ruling.

Plaintiff'S Motion For A Preliminary Injunction Against Defendants Koray Ergur And Byft Llc.
Plaintiff's Motion for Preliminary Injunction is continued to February 18, 2021. Moving party to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers per SFLR 2.7B no later than February 8, 2022 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court received courtesy copy of Notice of Non-Opposition filed on February 1, 2022.

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (501/CFH)
